en: At the end of twenty years, in which Solomon had built the house of the LORD and his own house,
zh: 所羅門建造耶和華的殿和自己的王宮，用了二十年才完成。

en: Solomon rebuilt the cities that Hiram had given to him, and settled the people of Israel in them.
zh: 所羅門又修築希蘭送給他的那些城市，使以色列人住在那裡。

en: And Solomon went to Hamath-zobah and took it.
zh: 所羅門到哈瑪瑣巴去，佔領了那地方。

en: He built Tadmor in the wilderness and all the store cities that he built in Hamath.
zh: 所羅門又修築了在曠野的達莫，和他在哈瑪建造的一切貯藏貨物的城市。

en: He also built Upper Beth-horon and Lower Beth-horon, fortified cities with walls, gates, and bars,
zh: 他又建造上伯．和崙和下伯．和崙，成了有牆、有門和有閂的設防城；

en: and Baalath, and all the store cities that Solomon had and all the cities for his chariots and the cities for his horsemen, and whatever Solomon desired to build in Jerusalem, in Lebanon, and in all the land of his dominion.
zh: 又建造巴拉和所羅門擁有的一切貯藏貨物的城市，以及一切囤放戰車的城市，馬兵駐紮的城市，和所羅門在耶路撒冷、黎巴嫩，以及他統治的全境內喜愛建造的一切。

en: All the people who were left of the Hittites, the Amorites, the Perizzites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites, who were not of Israel,
zh: 至於以色列人以外的赫人、亞摩利人、比利洗人、希未人和耶布斯人剩下來的人民，

en: from their descendants who were left after them in the land, whom the people of Israel had not destroyed- these Solomon drafted as forced labor, and so they are to this day.
zh: 他們的子孫仍然留在那地，以色列人沒有消滅他們。於是，所羅門徵召他們作苦工，直到今日。

en: But of the people of Israel Solomon made no slaves for his work; they were soldiers, and his officers, the commanders of his chariots, and his horsemen.
zh: 唯獨以色列人，所羅門沒有驅使他們為他的工程作奴僕；他們作了他的戰士、軍長、車兵長和馬兵長。

en: And these were the chief officers of King Solomon, 250, who exercised authority over the people.
zh: 所羅門王有二百五十名監工，監督工人。

en: Solomon brought Pharaoh's daughter up from the city of David to the house that he had built for her, for he said, "My wife shall not live in the house of David king of Israel, for the places to which the ark of the LORD has come are holy."
zh: 所羅門把法老的女兒從大衛城，帶到他為她建造的宮裡去；因為他說：“我的妻子不可住在以色列王大衛的宮裡，因為耶和華的約櫃所到的地方都是神聖的。”

en: Then Solomon offered up burnt offerings to the LORD on the altar of the LORD that he had built before the vestibule,
zh: 那時，所羅門在耶和華的壇上，就是在走廊前面他建築的壇上，向耶和華獻上燔祭，

en: as the duty of each day required, offering according to the commandment of Moses for the Sabbaths, the new moons, and the three annual feasts- the Feast of Unleavened Bread, the Feast of Weeks, and the Feast of Booths.
zh: 又照著摩西的吩咐，在安息日、初一和一年三次特定的節期，就是除酵節、七七節、住棚節，獻上每日當獻的。

en: According to the ruling of David his father, he appointed the divisions of the priests for their service, and the Levites for their offices of praise and ministry before the priests as the duty of each day required, and the gatekeepers in their divisions at each gate, for so David the man of God had commanded.
zh: 所羅門又照著他父親大衛所定的，設立了祭司的班次，執行他們的事奉，又派遣利未人，各守本職，讚美耶和華，在祭司面前照著每日的本分事奉。又派守門的按著班次看守各門。因為這是神人大衛的吩咐。

en: And they did not turn aside from what the king had commanded the priests and Levites concerning any matter and concerning the treasuries.
zh: 王對祭司和利未人所吩咐的，無論是甚麼事務，或是有關庫房的事，他們都沒有違抗。

en: Thus was accomplished all the work of Solomon from the day the foundation of the house of the LORD was laid until it was finished. So the house of the LORD was completed.
zh: 從耶和華的殿奠基的日子起，直到建成，所羅門的一切工程都進行順利。這樣，耶和華的殿就完成了。

en: Then Solomon went to Ezion-geber and Eloth on the shore of the sea, in the land of Edom.
zh: 那時，所羅門往以東地，到靠近海邊的以旬．迦別和以祿去了。

en: And Hiram sent to him by the hand of his servants ships and servants familiar with the sea, and they went to Ophir together with the servants of Solomon and brought from there 450 talents of gold and brought it to King Solomon.
zh: 希蘭派他的臣僕，把船隻和熟悉航海的僕人，送到所羅門那裡。他們和所羅門的僕人一同去到俄斐，從那裡得了一萬五千公斤金子，運到所羅門王那裡。
